meaning: n.螂･蜈ｰ豐ｻ蜈壼遭,讖吝ｸｦ蜈壼遭
examples: Archbishop Robin Eames of the Church of Ireland and, perhaps most significantly, the Reverend William Bingham, a leading Orangeman, were also shocked into action.
Maximo Park also impressed on the second stage, with bowler-hatted singer Paul Smith stalking the stage like a hyperactive Orangeman just told the Twelfth has been cancelled.
